build.beforeDevCommand: rm -rf tauri-dist && mkdir -p tauri-dist/vendor tauri-dist/fonts tauri-dist/assets && cp index.html styles.css app.js rendering.js project-model.js tauri-dist/ && cp assets/brand-logo.png tauri-dist/assets/ && cp node_modules/lucide/dist/umd/lucide.min.js tauri-dist/vendor/ && cp node_modules/pretendard/dist/web/static/woff2/Pretendard-*.woff2 tauri-dist/fonts/
build.beforeBuildCommand: rm -rf tauri-dist && mkdir -p tauri-dist/vendor tauri-dist/fonts tauri-dist/assets && cp index.html styles.css app.js rendering.js project-model.js tauri-dist/ && cp assets/brand-logo.png tauri-dist/assets/ && cp node_modules/lucide/dist/umd/lucide.min.js tauri-dist/vendor/ && cp node_modules/pretendard/dist/web/static/woff2/Pretendard-*.woff2 tauri-dist/fonts/

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; media-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'
